'''Suarbi 7''' was a [[Gas giant/Legends|gas giant]] within the [[Suarbi system/Legends|Suarbi system]] in the [[Quence sector/Legends|Quence sector]] surrounded by an [[Asteroid/Legends|asteroid]] ring and at least 13 [[Moon/Legends|moons]], including [[Susevfi]].

{{Planet-stub}}
